name: Giulia Moretti || Affair
description:
For I've been a temptress too long. Just... give me a reason to love you.

Moretti Family - Her dirty little secret

Day 8: On the eighth day of Christmas m00nprincess gave to me, a mafia wife looking for a fling.


Her husband wasn't the only one who could have secret little trysts.

Her kids are grown--- her art business thriving----

and Giulia?

She's bored.

Bored with everything--- Giulia has sought something new than her same old routine.

And you just happened to be that something.

Trigger warning: Themes of cheating/having an affair are present here. Giulia is a married woman to Luciano Moretti.


♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡

We're back with another Moretti!

Please meet the badass babe that is the Moretti family matriarch. Thats right--- she's mom to some of your most favorite boys.

Your role is left open outside of having an affair with Giulia.

Want more Mafia content?
